data.title: Rocket Lab Joins US Space Force's $5.6 Billion Launch Program; Stock Soars
data.description: Rocket Lab USA secures eligibility for the U.S. Space Force's NSSL Phase 3 Lane 1, a $5.6 billion initiative. The company plans to deploy its Neutron rocket, a reusable medium-lift vehicle, for critical national security launches. With 63 Electron missions completed, Rocket Lab strengthens its position as a key player in the defense and space industry.

data.title: Intel's SuperFluid Cooling Tech 'Possibly Suitable For Nvidia's GB300' Chips, Says Expert Amid INTC's Efforts To Secure Commitments For Foundry Services
data.description: Intel's SuperFluid cooling tech could be useful for Nvidia Corp.'s GB300 chips, which were launched during its GTC conference.

data.title: Asia Markets Mixed, Europe Falls On Auto Tariff Concerns And Gold Hits All-Time High - Global Markets Today While US Slept
This KLA Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Friday
Federal Reserve Is 'Gaslighting The Public,' Warns Expert As Richmond Fed President Says 'Inflation Expectations Have Loosened, Not De-Anchored'
data.description: Craig Shapiro has said that the Federal Reserve has been "gaslighting the public," after Tom Barkin said that inflation is not "de-anchored".
